caption: A news broadcast segment titled "PLUS POLITICS" features a male presenter in a dark suit, white shirt, and maroon tie. He stands before a blue and teal circular graphic background. Beside him, a split-screen insert shows a man wearing a red traditional cap and glasses, identified by on-screen text as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and a "POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS," under the heading "ON THE PHONE." The lower third of the screen displays the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Additional text and logos appear at the bottom, including "FOLLOW US" with social media icons, "PLUSTVAFRICA," and broadcast information: "WATCH ON DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308." In later frames, the bottom banner changes to "WATCH ONLINE" followed by the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV." The presenter remains stationary and maintains a neutral expression throughout the sequence.
